data.title: Oracle's Earnings Fallout Offers Hidden Contrarian Opportunity
data.description: Oracle floundered after a poor Q2 print. However, options traders should consider the empirical data, which supports a bullish approach.

data.title: As BlueSky Surges, Could Trump Sell His Truth Social Shares Ahead of Inauguration?
data.description: Trump Media faces fierce competition in social media industry from giants like Facebook and Twitter. Trump has shot down talk of selling his stake in Truth Social before his inauguration.

data.title: Biden Set To Block US Steel Sale To Nippon Steel: Report
data.description: United States Steel shares are plunging Tuesday following a Bloomberg report that President Joe Biden will block the company's proposed acquisition by Nippon Steel.

data.title: General Motors Stock Is Rising After The Bell: What's Driving The Action?
data.description: General Motors shares are rising in Tuesday's after-hours session after the company announced plans to refocus autonomous driving development on personal vehicles.

data.title: December Interest Rate Cut Is Almost A Done Deal: Could Wednesday Inflation Data Derail Investor Hopes? (CORRECTED)
data.description: Next week, the Fed will also weigh broader economic trends, including employment and consumer spending, as it deliberates its next steps.
